changeSet.author: notarist-security
changeSet.comment: VPD predicate function referenced by all NOTARIST tenant policies (fixes F4)

changeSet.author: notarist-security
changeSet.comment: Row-level tenant isolation on NOTARIST.DOKUMEN_LEGAL (fixes F7)
changeSet.sql: BEGIN DBMS_RLS.ADD_POLICY( object_schema => 'NOTARIST', object_name => 'DOKUMEN_LEGAL', policy_name => 'DOKUMEN_LEGAL_TENANT_POLICY', function_schema => 'NOTARIST', policy_function => 'TENANT_ISOLATION_POLICY', statement_types => 'SELECT,INSERT,UPDATE,DELETE', update_check => TRUE, enable => TRUE ); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN IF SQLCODE != -28101 THEN RAISE; END IF; -- ORA-28101: policy already exists END;

changeSet.author: notarist-security
changeSet.comment: Row-level tenant isolation on NOTARIST.NOTARIST_USER (fixes F7)
changeSet.sql: BEGIN DBMS_RLS.ADD_POLICY( object_schema => 'NOTARIST', object_name => 'NOTARIST_USER', policy_name => 'NOTARIST_USER_TENANT_POLICY', function_schema => 'NOTARIST', policy_function => 'TENANT_ISOLATION_POLICY', statement_types => 'SELECT,INSERT,UPDATE,DELETE', update_check => TRUE, enable => TRUE ); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN IF SQLCODE != -28101 THEN RAISE; END IF; END;
